title: Minecraft Snapshot 24w33a Redstone Torch Backport
description: A backport for the new and improved redstone torch texture and model, as well as any blocks that contain the redstone torch, such as the comparator and repeater.
body:
Have you ever played Minecraft Snapshot 24w33a, looked at the redstone torch, and thought, "Wow, that's a very clean design! If only I could use it on my 1.21 worlds...."

Well, now you can!

![The new redstone torches, some on, some off, with a few connecting pieces of redstone.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a83158cfb0e81707105fa576007cca72cc5bbc94.png)

This is a backport of the new redstone torch texture and model (first previewed on August 15th, 2024) to the older releases of Minecraft. It also includes related blocks that contain a redstone torch, such as the comparator and repeater.
